chapter_title.en: HADEETH ABOUT THE ONE WHO IS BORN IN AL-ISLAM

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على الشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5 / 372)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على الشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5 / 372)
text: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ (صلى الله عليه وآله) خَلَّتَانِ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ فِيهِمَا مَفْتُونٌ الصِّحَّةُ وَ الْفَرَاغُ.

en.hubeali: H 14584 – And by this chain, who has narrated the following:
Imamasws said: ‘The Prophetsaww said: ‘There are two qualities which the people are infatuated with – the health and the leisure’.
en.sarwar: 136. And by this chain, who has narrated the following: Imam (a.s.) said: ‘The Prophet (saww) said: ‘There are two qualities which the people are infatuated with – the health and the leisure’.
